name: Fast & Furious Trans
recent_news: No M&A or news located. Several unrelated 'Fast And Furious' freight/trucking carriers exist in CA, FL, GA and Deerfield, IL but none match this Mount Prospect, IL residential address. Likely a single-vehicle owner-operator van service.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Residential address, 2 employees, ~$151K revenue, no website, no school district contracts identifiable. Sub-scale single-van NEMT/special-needs operator at best; not an independent school-bus contractor for tuck-in.

name: Grayhawk Limousine Inc
recent_news: No news, no website, no acquisition signals. Not affiliated with Grayhawk limousine brands in Arizona or any school-bus operator. Cook County area is dominated by Cook-Illinois Corp (American School Bus-Orland Park) for school transport.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Limousine company with 2 employees at a residential address; livery/sedan operator rather than yellow-school-bus contractor. No school district relationships found. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: H & L Passenger Svc
recent_news: H & L Passenger Services, Inc. holds an NPI as a Non-emergency Medical Transport (Van) provider; classified as medical/Medicaid transportation, not a school-bus contractor. No M&A or growth news.
fit_notes: Not a fit. NEMT van provider, not a school-bus contractor. 2 employees, no fleet scale. Outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in criteria.

name: Hispa Transport
recent_news: No public news, website, or acquisition signals. Address is a unit (U406) within a multi-tenant building on W Lawrence Ave, Chicago, suggesting a very small owner-operator van service. CPS uses its own routed yellow-bus contracts via larger contractors.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Sub-scale single-van operator (2 employees, ~$151K revenue) with no identifiable district contracts or fleet. Not an independent school-bus platform suitable for Summit tuck-in.

name: Hope Medivan Inc
recent_news: Hope Medivan Inc holds NPI 1598065864 classified as Secured Medical Transport (Van). Active wheelchair-accessible NEMT operator in Bridgeview, IL since 2007. No M&A or growth news.
fit_notes: Not a fit. NEMT/Medicaid van provider rather than yellow-school-bus contractor. 2 employees, single van. Outside Summit's K-12 school-bus tuck-in scope, even though independent and family-scale.
